Name: Old-School R&B Guitar: At Last (Etta James)
Description__c: Learn to play this classic Etta James standard with soul-drenched R&B chord voicings and smooth melodic phrasing.

Name: Soloing on Long Train Runnin'
Description__c: Craft expressive bluesy solos over this Doobie Brothers classic using pentatonic vocabulary and soulful phrasing.

Name: Modern Soulful R&B Rhythm Guitar
Description__c: Master the layered chord techniques and rhythmic patterns that define modern R&B and soul guitar playing.

Name: Learn These Essential Soul Guitar Moves
Description__c: Old-school soul guitar vocabulary: sweet chord embellishments and double stops you can use on any major chord.

Name: Blues Meets Jazz: Robben Ford Chord Tricks
Description__c: Bridge the gap between blues and jazz with Robben Ford signature chord substitutions and sophisticated voicings.

Name: Play Blues Like Robben Ford!
Description__c: Two choruses of jazz-blues improvisation in the Robben Ford style with sophisticated phrasing over classic changes.
